name: Toast
description: A temporary notification that appears at the edge of the viewport.

props.name: status
props.description: Semantic status controlling icon, border accent, and progress bar color.

props.name: position
props.description: Screen position where the toast appears.

props.name: duration
props.description: Auto-dismiss delay in milliseconds. Pauses on hover.

props.name: closable
props.description: Show a close button for manual dismissal.

props.name: showIcon
props.description: Show the status icon before the message content.

slots.name: title
slots.description: Optional bold title above the message.

events.name: kb-close
events.description: Dispatched when the toast is dismissed.
